text_block_list.text:
In a remote region of the continent of Uma Nest 
looms the castle of the demon lord.

text_block_list.name: Horse Lord Golshi
text_block_list.text:
Man, that was tasty! Nothing beats ruining 
an entire civilization for a bowl of risotto!

text_block_list.name: Horse Lord Golshi
text_block_list.text:
Anyways… what am I going to do about El and Grass? 
I would've been unstoppable if they hadn't showed up.

text_block_list.name: Horse Lord Golshi
text_block_list.text:
I better get prepared before they barge their way into my castle.
Hey, Demon General A! Demon General B!

text_block_list.name: Demon Generals
text_block_list.text: How can we serve you, your demonic lordship?

text_block_list.name: Horse Lord Golshi
text_block_list.text: It's Gold Ship, got it? The Horse Lord Gold Ship!

text_block_list.name: Horse Lord Golshi
text_block_list.text:
Now listen up. Go and give that brawler El and her 
cleric Grass a good spanking and send 'em packing!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I see. The "lordship" that demon officer revered so much… 
is actually Gold Ship! If she's the cause of this recent trouble, 
we'll need to take her out as soon as possible.
Ohohoho! I'm not about to let that happen!

text_block_list.name: Madam King
text_block_list.text:
You're going to meet your end right here, right now. 
As the Horse Lord's first-rate general, I, Madam King, 
will make sure of it!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Madam… King? A demon modeled after King Halo, I gather.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
An evil King… let's just ignore her. 
She'll probably fall to ruin all on her own.

text_block_list.name: Madam King
text_block_list.text: How rude! I will not fall to ruin in any way!

text_block_list.name: Madam King
text_block_list.text:
I should warn you though, I'm not the only general here 
to thwart your little plans. Take a look up at the sky.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: …!? Where did those dark clouds come from all of a sudden…?

text_block_list.name: Madam King
text_block_list.text:
Ohohoho! Some demons are able to manipulate 
the weather to their liking. It just so happens that 
my fellow general is one such demon!

text_block_list.name: Bloody Sky
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe. I'm the dark druid, Bloody Sky. 
The peaceful Sky you love is about to disappear forever!

text_block_list.name: Bloody Sky
text_block_list.text: Come, crimson clouds! Bathe this world in red!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Th-the sky's starting to look all dark and gloomy! Oh no…

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Be careful, El! We don't know what 
kind of magic they'll cast next…!

text_block_list.name: Bloody Sky
text_block_list.text: Hehehehehe!

text_block_list.name: Bloody Sky
text_block_list.text:
I mean, changing the sky's color is pretty much 
the extent of my abilities.

text_block_list.name: Bloody Sky
text_block_list.text:
But still, it really set the mood, huh? 
You can take it from here, King!

text_block_list.name: Madam King
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Passing the buck before the deed is done again? 
Why are you always… Oh… Ahem… Where were we?

text_block_list.name: Madam King
text_block_list.text:
Now then, El. Allow me to welcome you to my wonderful 
realm of illusion and magic. Welcome to The King's World!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Huh…? Where am I?

text_block_list.name: Madam King
text_block_list.text:
As you can surely see, this is the ballroom of my lordship's 
royal palace. In this arena, we ladies will compete not by 
combat, but through dance.

text_block_list.name: Madam King
text_block_list.text:
So, would you care to dance, El? 
Surely, you know a friendly social dance or two?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: A, a what?! I-I mean, I know a dance, sure…

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Check this out! Mambo! 
A-cha-cha-cha! Cha-cha-cha-cha! Woo!

text_block_list.name: Madam King
text_block_list.text:
What? Your moves are terrible. It's like watching a snow monkey 
try to dance. You have the nerve to constantly boast about being 
the world's strongest, but by the looks of it…

text_block_list.name: Madam King
text_block_list.text: You're the world's weakest dancer!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Gahhhh! The world's… weakest?!

text_block_list.name: Madam King
text_block_list.text:
Yes. You are the world's absolute weakest. 
Weakest, weakest, weakest…

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
The weakest, the weakest… I give up… 
I can't bounce back from this…

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Pull yourself together, El! Don't let those illusions sway you!

text_block_list.name: Madam King
text_block_list.text:
Ohohoho! With El down, we now only have the cleric 
to deal with. You won't stand a chance against us.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Yes… You have a point. Unlike El, I can't fight with my fists. 
All I can do is…

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Brighten up this cloudy sky.

text_block_list.name: Madam King
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! Where did that surge in magical power come from? 
Grass, what are you up to?!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
If magic shrouds the world in darkness, then as a cleric, 
it is my duty to clear that darkness away — by the thunderous 
light of the heavens.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
El wasn't the only one growing stronger as we fought 
battle after battle to get here!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Divine judgment, come down and cleanse this world! 
Ninth-level cleric spell: Angelic Bolt!!!

text_block_list.name: Madam King
text_block_list.text:
Huhhh?! The bloodstained clouds and my ballroom 
both vanished in a blink of an eye!

text_block_list.name: Madam King
text_block_list.text: Retreat, Sky! We have to retreat!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Grass… That was amazing! You finally mastered Angelic Bolt!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
With that spell under your belt, defeating the Horse Lord 
will be a piece of cake!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
"Fantasy incarnate… shall look down upon this world from the
heavens. With innate, thunderous power…"

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: ¿Qué…? Something the matter?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
No, it's nothing. Now then, shall we be off? 
We've got a castle to storm!
